citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: A graph is a collection of labeled nodes connected by labeled links. Every link has a source node and a target node; every node has a set of incoming links and a set of outgoing links. Trees are a special case of graphs.
